regime_fall.current_status: US military presence in West Asia has reached over 57,000 troops with 82nd Airborne and special forces arriving March 29-30, 2026, as Trump maintains diplomatic pause until April 6 while threatening strikes on Kharg Island and Iranian infrastructure if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed; Iran's regime simultaneously faces internal collapse with Khamenei's death, IRGC consolidation of power, and widespread infrastructure degradation from 13,000 strikes since February 28.
regime_fall.last_major_event: US and allied forces have conducted 13,000 strikes since the war began on February 28, 2026, with 82nd Airborne Brigade Combat Team arriving March 30 and Trump threatening to destroy Kharg Island oil hub and Iranian power plants if Strait of Hormuz is not reopened.
